data.biography: Cha Mi-kyung is a South Korean actress. She made her acting debut in 2007, since then, she has appeared in number of films and television series. She is known for her roles in Itaewon Class (2020), Racket Boys and The Red Sleeve (2021). She has acted in films as: Kim Ji-young, Born 1982 (2019) and Three Sisters (2020) among others. In 2021 she appeared in TV series Our Beloved Summer and in 2022 she is cast in TV series Showtime Begins! alongside Park Hae-jin.
data.name: Cha Mi-kyeong

data.biography: Cha Mi-kyung est une actrice sud-coréenne. Elle a fait ses débuts d'actrice en 2007 et depuis, elle est apparue dans de nombreux films et séries télévisées. Elle est connue pour ses rôles dans Itaewon Class, Racket Boys et The Red Sleeve. Wikipedia
data.name: Kim Mi-kyeong
